channel.title: Gastronauts
channel.description: Latest releases from Gastronauts on Dropout.tv

item.title: Too Goo to Be True
item.description:
Chefs Cris Brown, Emily Lim, and Solomon Johnson make the blandest meal for Katie, Raph, and Tao.

Duration: 42:29

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, katie marovitch, raphael chestang, tao yang, cris brown, emily lim, solomon johnson
